testcase.name: Verify user can access dashboard after login
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application............................passed Then Dashboard title should be displayed....................................passed

testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to Admin module

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(), 'Admin')]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\parsh\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58800}, goog:processID: 77596, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58800/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a6d0faa540d35407b49bf6031b019c9f

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(), 'Admin')]"}. testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to My Info module

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(), 'My Info')]"}. testcase.name: Verify user can logout from the application
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application............................passed When User clicks on user dropdown and logout................................passed Then User should be logged out and redirected to login page.................passed

testcase.name: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Dashboard title is empty at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.DashboardSteps.verifyDashboardTitle(DashboardSteps.java:48) at ✽.Dashboard title should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:14)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123".............passed And User clicks the login button............................................passed Then User should be redirected to the dashboard.............................passed And Dashboard title should be displayed.....................................failed

testcase.name: Verify user can login with different valid credentials - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123".............passed And User clicks the login button............................................passed Then User should be redirected to the dashboard.............................passed

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid username
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.errorMessageDisplayed(LoginSteps.java:118) at ✽.An error message should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:30)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed When User enters invalid username "InvalidUser" and password "admin123".....passed And User clicks the login button............................................passed Then An error message should be displayed...................................failed And User should remain on the login page....................................skipped

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid password
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.errorMessageDisplayed(LoginSteps.java:118) at ✽.An error message should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:37)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "InvalidPassword"......passed And User clicks the login button............................................passed Then An error message should be displayed...................................failed And User should remain on the login page....................................skipped

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid credentials
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.errorMessageDisplayed(LoginSteps.java:118) at ✽.An error message should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:44)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed When User enters invalid username "InvalidUser" and password "InvalidPassword".passed And User clicks the login button............................................passed Then An error message should be displayed...................................failed And User should remain on the login page....................................skipped

testcase.name: Verify login page elements are displayed
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page...................................passed Then Login page should display username and password fields.................passed
